constraints.description: SQLite-based EventStore — writes are single-node. At > 10k events/sec the WAL becomes a bottleneck.
constraints.mitigation: Replace with PostgreSQL or distributed log (Phase I2 ready, not activated). Monitor WAL lag. Triggers at 8k events/sec.

constraints.description: Replay determinism is ≥ 99.3% but not 100% — time-dependent operations (wall_clock, random seeds) drift across runs.
constraints.mitigation: Accept ≤ 0.7% drift for time-dependent DAGs. Isolate time via TimeProvider interface in future.

constraints.description: Worker pool is fixed at construction time (default 4, max 256). No dynamic auto-scaling in production.
constraints.mitigation: Auto-scaler implemented but not activated. Manual scaling via operator action. Set target count via `build_final_release(worker_pool_size=N)`.

constraints.description: TopologyViewer returns static/mocked data — no live agent inventory. Operator CLI shows placeholder worker topology.
constraints.mitigation: Post-freeze agent discovery integration. Current worker count hardcoded to 3. Acceptable for pilot.

constraints.description: ReplayDrift metric reports 0.0 (placeholder) — no actual cross-run drift measurement implemented.
constraints.mitigation: Accurate drift requires replay baseline comparison. Accept 0.0 placeholder for pilot. Tracked as AD-007.

constraints.description: Operator UI is single-process (no auth, no TLS, no multi-session). Suitable for local pilot only.
constraints.mitigation: Wrap behind reverse proxy with basic auth for >3 users. TLS and session management not implemented.

constraints.description: Multi-agent layer (G5) has zero test coverage — conceptual only. Not activated in production.
constraints.mitigation: Deferred to K6 phase. No runtime impact — layer is not wired in CompositionRoot.

constraints.description: `/api/auth/refresh` has no rate limiting — brute-force refresh token rotation possible.
constraints.mitigation: Add in-memory rate limiter (10 req/min per user) before wider deployment. Acceptable for pilot ≤5 tenants.

constraints.description: Refresh token replay detection uses in-memory store — server restart loses token state.
constraints.mitigation: Migrate to persistent store (Redis/DB) post-freeze. Acceptable for single-node pilot.

constraints.description: JWT lifecycle hardening (2h expiry, refresh rotation, one-time-use) deployed in-place — no active session migration path.
constraints.mitigation: Existing sessions expire within 2h requiring re-login. Acceptable for pilot.
